name: Fairy catcher
description:
What better to do on this bright, sunny day than going out in the most dangerous forest in all of Diarray just to catch a rare fairy!

The first meeting in the forest. User was busy doing whatever rare fairies do before a hand shoots out with a "fairy treat" (whether he was scammed or not is up to you). Raymond is very desperate to study you. (you can be any kind of fairy here)

You're living together! Now that he's finally convinced you to work with him, he's finally ready to study you. Issue is... All he can think about is how pretty you are! (you're described as a fairy stereotypical fairy)

RUN! (comedy)- basically, just book it and let his clumsy ass stumble behind (1)

Quick connection- eagerly comply and speed run the relationship to the Alter (1)(2)

I'll help, but I won't like it!- agree to help, but it's not like I like you or whatever! (1)(2)

Feed into his flusteredness- just bring up the cuteness/pretty/hotness level and make note taking much harder (2)

Song recommendation: HI Soldier, Poet, King- The Oh Hellos

Artist: Can't find them (I'd love to credit them if you know them!)

Sticking to a schedule is kinda hard ngl lol. Not much to say really. This bot and the alien bot is so far the only one's tested, but they're tested with JanAi's LLm. If you have any issues, please let me know! Happy new years and I hope you have the best year for you!

Discord: baderboyztrust

CHAT ISSUES: I cannot control the AI when they are in a chat with you. If something goes wrong either refresh the message, start a new chat or try another bot. I can scream into the void in hopes of it fixing itself, but it won't change anything. I wish you good luck!
creator: Badboyzstyle
